questions.question_text: Have you received a COVID-19 vaccine?
Which language do you speak most often at home?
COVID-19 test swabs have been shown to cause cancer.
COVID-19 test swabs have been shown to cause cancer.
New evidence shows that monkeypox is a side effect of the COVID-19 vaccines.
New evidence shows that monkeypox is a side effect of the COVID-19 vaccines.
There is little to no evidence that masks help reduce the spread of COVID-19
There is little to no evidence that masks help reduce the spread of COVID-19
To rush COVID-19 vaccines to the market, pharmaceutical companies took shortcuts that compromised the safety of the vaccines.
To rush COVID-19 vaccines to the market, pharmaceutical companies took shortcuts that compromised the safety of the vaccines.
The fatality rate of COVID-19 has been deliberately and greatly exaggerated in the mainstream media.
The fatality rate of COVID-19 has been deliberately and greatly exaggerated in the mainstream media.
Some antiviral medications can reduce the risk of hospitalization in adults infected with COVID-19.
Some antiviral medications can reduce the risk of hospitalization in adults infected with COVID-19.
Children can become seriously ill from COVID-19.
Children can become seriously ill from COVID-19.
Vitamin and mineral supplements cannot cure COVID-19.
Vitamin and mineral supplements cannot cure COVID-19.
Both vaccinated and unvaccinated individuals can transmit COVID-19 to others.
Both vaccinated and unvaccinated individuals can transmit COVID-19 to others.
People can be infected with COVID-19 more than once.
People can be infected with COVID-19 more than once.

Canada's economic growth
Compared to most other people in Canada, my views on COVID-19 are:
To what extent do you agree or disagree with the following statement: The COVID-19 pandemic was overblown.
How much do you support or oppose the following health-related policy: A requirement to wear a mask in indoor public settings if there is another COVID-19 outbreak.
In the LAST TWO MONTHS, how often have you worn a face mask in public indoor settings (when it was not mandatory) to avoid getting COVID-19 or to prevent the spread of COVID-19?
To what extent do you trust or distrust the Government of Canada to make decisions about COVID-19 that are in the best interest of Canada?
Climate change is a conspiracy created by governments around the world.
Climate change is a conspiracy created by governments around the world.
Global average temperatures haven't increased in the last 20 years.
Global average temperatures haven't increased in the last 20 years.
Many NASA scientists admit that climate change is caused by changes in Earth's solar orbit.
Many NASA scientists admit that climate change is caused by changes in Earth's solar orbit.
Solar panels emit more greenhouse gases during manufacturing than they end up saving.
Solar panels emit more greenhouse gases during manufacturing than they end up saving.
Canada's national carbon price has tripled the cost of gasoline at the pump since 2019.
Canada's national carbon price has tripled the cost of gasoline at the pump since 2019.
Canada's annual greenhouse gas emissions have been relatively stable for 20 years.
Canada's annual greenhouse gas emissions have been relatively stable for 20 years.
Canada has higher average greenhouse gas emissions per person than China.
Canada has higher average greenhouse gas emissions per person than China.
Over half of Canada's electricity comes from renewable sources (like wind, solar, hydro).
Over half of Canada's electricity comes from renewable sources (like wind, solar, hydro).
The Arctic is warming at a rate almost twice the global average.
The Arctic is warming at a rate almost twice the global average.
The scientific consensus is that climate change will contribute to the extinction of a large number of animal species.
The scientific consensus is that climate change will contribute to the extinction of a large number of animal species.

Canada's economic growth

Most of Canada's immigrants come from the Middle East and North Africa.
Most of Canada's immigrants come from the Middle East and North Africa.
Half of Canada's immigrants each year are refugees.
Half of Canada's immigrants each year are refugees.
Immigrants who were not yet Canadian citizens were allowed to vote in the last federal election.
Immigrants who were not yet Canadian citizens were allowed to vote in the last federal election.
Refugees in Canada receive more money from the government than the average pensioner.
Refugees in Canada receive more money from the government than the average pensioner.
Across Canadian cities, more immigration is associated with higher crime rates.
Across Canadian cities, more immigration is associated with higher crime rates.
Immigration makes up almost all of Canada's population growth.
Immigration makes up almost all of Canada's population growth.
About a third of Canadian physicians are immigrants.
About a third of Canadian physicians are immigrants.
Immigrant workers make up most of Canada's growth in high- and medium-skilled jobs.
Immigrant workers make up most of Canada's growth in high- and medium-skilled jobs.
The majority of immigrants to Canada speak English and/or French in their homes.
The majority of immigrants to Canada speak English and/or French in their homes.
Refugees have to pass a security background and criminal check before receiving refugee status.
Refugees have to pass a security background and criminal check before receiving refugee status.

Government should hold social media companies accountable for what appears on their platforms.

response_options.label: By editors and journalists that work for news outlets
By editors and journalists that work for Facebook / other so
By computer analysis of what you interacted with in the past

questions.question_text: How often do you meet socially with friends, relatives, or work colleagues?
Think of all the friends you had contact with in the past month in person, by telephone, or online. Roughly how many share the same political views as you?
There is someone I can turn to for advice about making very important decisions.
If I needed an emergency loan of $500, I know someone I could turn to.
I could personally reach out to people in authority positions to help with a problem
How much would you say the political system in Canada allows people like you to have an influence on politics?
I accept the outcomes of Canadian elections, regardless of who wins.
Individuals in Canada are free to express their personal views on political topics without fear of surveillance or punishment.
Individuals in Canada are free to practise and express their religious faith or nonbelief in public and private.
Individuals can freely assemble in Canada (e.g., freedom to protest peacefully, engage in petitions, organize public events).
The Canadian justice system treats everyone equally.

In the past 12 months, approximately how often have you interacted with federal government services (e.g. Service Canada, federal courts, employment insurance, benefits/aids, Indigenous services, etc...).
If the government had a budget surplus, should it use it to reduce taxes or increase spending on social services?
All things considered, how satisfied are you with your life as a whole?

Much of our lives are being controlled by plots hatched in secret places.
The people who really 'run' the country are not known to the voters.
It is important to be loyal to your beliefs even when evidence is brought to bear against them.
Whether something feels true is more important than evidence.
Most of today's science is concerned with solving problems of the distant future.
I rarely interact with scientists in real life.
Scientific knowledge is a reliable way to solve important issues.
Science and scientific research play a big role in my local geographical area.
